meta.title: Veracruz 2019 Results - ESPN
meta.description: Get all the Veracruz results for the 2019 season on ESPN. Includes all the Veracruz results from all national and international games.

articles.headline: Punjab stun Bengaluru FC with 2-0 win (Courtesy: FanCode)
articles.description: Nsungusi Effiong's brace guided Punjab to a shock win at the Kanteerava

images.alt: Punjab stun Bengaluru FC with 2-0 win (Courtesy: FanCode)

articles.headline: New England postpones MLS home opener after historic blizzard
articles.description: The New England Revolution postponed their March 7 home opener against Houston because the field won't be ready at Gillette Stadium after a historic blizzard.

images.alt: New England postpones MLS home opener after historic blizzard

articles.headline: USLPA authorizes strike with season kickoff looming
articles.description: The USLPA has voted to authorize its bargaining committee to call a strike unless an agreement with the USL can be reached on a new Collective Bargaining Agreement.

images.alt: USLPA authorizes strike with season kickoff looming

articles.headline: Pep Guardiola: 'Bit weird' that Man City are playing Real Madrid again
articles.description: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola admits it feels "a little bit weird" to be facing Real Madrid in the Champions League yet again.

images.alt: Pep Guardiola: 'Bit weird' that Man City are playing Real Madrid again

articles.headline: Rhind-Tutt: Dortmund game a chance for Bayern to make a title statement
articles.description: Archie Rhind-Tutt fears for Borussia Dortmund after their Champions League exit as they prepare to face Bayern Munich in a must-win game for their title hopes.

images.alt: Rhind-Tutt: Dortmund game a chance for Bayern to make a title statement

articles.headline: Benfica suspend 5 fans for racist behaviour vs. Real Madrid
articles.description: Benfica suspended five supporters after an investigation found they engaged in behaviour of a "racist nature" in the club's match with Real Madrid.

images.alt: Benfica suspend 5 fans for racist behaviour vs. Real Madrid

articles.headline: Barcelona change punishment for late players to 'huge' fines
articles.description: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick confirmed he has replaced dropping players with "huge" fines in the event they arrive late on match days.

images.alt: Barcelona change punishment for late players to 'huge' fines
